query: SELECT production_log_id, COUNT(*) as task_count, SUM(CASE WHEN actual_minutes IS NOT NULL AND actual_minutes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tasks_with_actual FROM production_log_tasks WHERE production_log_id IN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM production_logs UNION SELECT 30001) GROUP BY production_log_id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 312dgmdUEzMUaK3.root --database Zag33ga6oUbL9GVhsFok4K --execute SELECT production_log_id, COUNT(*) as task_count, SUM(CASE WHEN actual_minutes IS NOT NULL AND actual_minutes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tasks_with_actual FROM production_log_tasks WHERE production_log_id IN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM production_logs UNION SELECT 30001) GROUP BY production_log_id
